title: Pundareekapuram Temple
tagline: Pundareekapuram Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pundareekapuram Temple is a small Hindu temple atop a little rise called Midayikunnam near Thalayolaparambu in Kottayam.
overview.description: Pundareekapuram Temple is a small Hindu temple atop a little rise called Midayikunnam near Thalayolaparambu in Kottayam. A tiled and saddle roofed square "Chuttambalam" encloses a square sanctum sanctorum. Appended to the square enclosure is a small ‘balikkalpura’. The (main deity) idol is the image of Vishnu sitting astride his celestial vehicle Garuda together with Bhoodevi.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vettikkattumukku
topPlaces.description: Vettikkattumukku is a small village town in Kottayam District, Kerala. It is part of Thalayolaparambu Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Manakunnam
topPlaces.description: Manakunnam is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thalayolaparambu
topPlaces.description: Thalayolaparambu is a town situated in Kottayam district in Kerala, India. Spanning over an area of 19.3 square kilometres with a population of 22,571 people, this mini-town is home to some of the well-known personalities such as the former Chief minister of Travancore-Cochin A. J. John, Anaparambil, the late Malayalam novelist/writer Vaikom Muhammed Basheer, the former Chief Justice of India K. G. Balakrishnan, and KK. Thalayolaparambu also hosts the major market established during the administration of Velu Thampi Dalawa, and is one of those few Keralite markets that still retains its old-world charm till date.

topPlaces.name: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple is located at Velloor, near to Thalayolaparambu in Kottayam district. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in separate sanctum sanatorum, facing east.

topPlaces.name: Velloor
topPlaces.description: Velloor (also known as Mevelloor) is a village in the Vaikom Taluk of the Kottayam district in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Vadayar
topPlaces.description: Vadayar is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. Vadayar Ilamkavu Devi Temple dedicated to Goddess Bhagavathy or Devi in a fierce form is located here, which about 9 km away from Vaikom on the bank of River Vadayar, a distributary of Muvattupuzha river.

topPlaces.name: Maravanthuruthu
topPlaces.description: Maravanthuruthu is a small village located in the Kottayam district of Kerala in India. It is surrounded by the river Muvattupuzha and is connected to the neighbouring villages Thalayolaparambu, Enādi by recently constructed bridges.

topPlaces.name: Kulasekharamangalam
topPlaces.description: Kulasekharamangalam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India.

Spanning over an area of 19.3 square kilometres with a population of 22,571 people, this mini-town is home to some of the well-known personalities such as the former Chief minister of Travancore-Cochin A. J. John, Anaparambil, the late Malayalam novelist/writer Vaikom Muhammed Basheer, the former Chief Justice of India K. G. Balakrishnan, and KK. Thalayolaparambu also hosts the major market established during the administration of Velu Thampi Dalawa, and is one of those few Keralite markets that still retains its old-world charm till date.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pundareekapuram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pundareekapuram Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pundareekapuram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pundareekapuram Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pundareekapuram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pundareekapuram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pundareekapuram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pundareekapuram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vettikkattumukku, Manakunnam, Thalayolaparambu, Velloor Perunthatta Siva Temple, Velloor.
